title: magic Ender Chest
description: a set of resources turns Ender's chest into a magic chest by changing its model and texture
body:
![magic Ender Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aefdc2b27ff3939f2c1d7b34b26c7eb9f33e2cc_0.webp)

![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cb24af972c703b54f4f1d0ac6f34096e57fc316.png) **This resource pack turns the Ender Chest into a magical chest. The resource pack itself changes the model and texture of the Ender Chest.**

**The texture has glowing parts, and when you open it, you can see stars, as if your items are stored in a separate dimension.**
![poloska](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb5a23d9aa754e615f86d589eabaa7b45adfb964.png)
![snac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e04e89260b8b6a17f20a2a80493dfb3a81169b1.png) **what's he doing!**
- changes the texture of the ender chest
- changes the model of the ender chest
- It has glowing parts on the texture

![heh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fcb388e192264a955a6b0eb6d8a82a39b8a34ea.png)  **Important note**

You will need Optifine for the resource pack to work

![poloska red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbfe25557393799a58b6587cede25b2183f5a5c5.png)
![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0076017f3f98f4a5045a198ed3fb213ab7d60ca8.png)
